arts.ttl: 'Chaos' at Man Utd goes back to 2013 - Evra
arts.sum: Five-time Premier League winner Patrice Evra says the future at Manchester United is "not bright" with his old club having been "in a chaos" for more than a decade.

arts.ttl: Antony sends Man United cryptic message after failing Erik ten Hag test ahead of Fenerbahce tie
arts.sum: Antony has failed to impress since joining Manchester United from Ajax for £85m in August 2022

arts.ttl: Report: Manchester United have now opened talks to sign £83m teenager compared to Cristiano Ronaldo
Xavi requests €100m Barcelona star as Manchester United signing if he replaces Ten Hag
arts.sum: Former Barcelona manager Xavi has reportedly requested the potential transfer of Brazilian winger Raphinha from his old club if he is to replace Erik ten Hag as Manchester United manager. The 27-year-old has been a star player for Barca so far this season, producing some of his best football since moving to the Nou Camp, […] The post Xavi requests €100m Barcelona star as Manchester United signing if he replaces Ten Hag appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: 'I turned down Man Utd for simple reason - Sir Alex Ferguson laughed about it'
arts.sum: Edgar Davids held talks with Manchester United before deciding to sign for AC Milan in 1996 and the former midfielder has said Sir Alex Ferguson could see the funny side to his decision

arts.ttl: Thomas Frank: Replacing Erik ten Hag at Man Utd will NOT improve my life
arts.sum: Thomas Frank: Replacing Erik ten Hag at Man Utd will NOT improve my life But when asked of the prospect of taking over a big club like Man Utd, Frank was not massively enthused - even if he didn’t rule out accepting the job.

arts.ttl: How Manchester United could line up under Xavi - with two major big-money arrivals
arts.sum: Manchester United have spent plenty of money under manager Erik ten Hag but could make further additions if Xavi replaces the Dutchman in the Old Trafford dugout

arts.ttl: Man United on 'Serie A scouting mission' as Red Devils 'watch Napoli duo'
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly had a scout at Napoli's Serie A clash against Empoli on Sunday to watch Khvicha Kvaratskhelia and Alessandro Buongiorno.

arts.ttl: Arguing about transfers was crucial as Thomas Tuchel chose England over Manchester United
arts.sum: Thomas Tuchel reportedly held talks with Manchester United, but it’s felt that arguing about transfers was a crucial factor in him favouring the England job, where this won’t be an issue. Tuchel was the top target for Man Utd co-owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe, but the German tactician has now ended up taking the chance to […] The post Arguing about transfers was crucial as Thomas Tuchel chose England over Manchester United appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Man Utd step up scouting mission for Liverpool target viewed as Mo Salah replacement
arts.sum: Manchester United appear to be the latest club interest in Napoli ace Khvicha Kvaratskhelia after the forward was linked to a move to the Premier League and eyed by Liverpool
